info.title: Flash Trade API
info.description: REST API for Flash Trade perpetuals program accounts (real-time via Yellowstone gRPC)

200.description: Health check with cached account counts
All enriched orders for owner (limit, TP, SL)

get.summary: WebSocket stream for an owner's positions and orders.
get.description:
Sends JSON messages with two types:
- `{ "type": "positions", "data": ... }` — from cached enrichment (interval + event-driven)
- `{ "type": "orders", "data": ... }` — from cached enrichment (event-driven)

Server sends Ping frames every 30s; closes if Pong not received within 10s.

parameters.name: includePnlInLeverageDisplay
parameters.description: Include PnL in leverage display calculation

parameters.name: updateIntervalMs
parameters.description: Position update interval in ms (default 1000, min 100, max 10000)

101.description: WebSocket upgrade — streams positions and orders as JSON messages

503.description: Service unavailable — global connection limit reached

200.description: All pool data with computed metrics
Single pool data with computed metrics

parameters.name: includePnlInLeverageDisplay
parameters.description: Include PnL in leverage display calculation

200.description: All positions for owner with PnL, leverage, and liquidation data
Exit fee and exit price for a position close
Limit order entry price, fee, liquidation price, borrow rate
Margin add/remove preview: new leverage, liquidation price, max amount
TP/SL preview: PnL from trigger price or trigger price from PnL/ROI
All current prices keyed by token symbol
Curated spot token list proxied from tokens.xyz

503.description: Cache not yet warm and upstream unreachable

200.description: Cancel all trigger orders for a market+side
Cancel a limit order and return reserved funds
Close position preview and optional transaction
Open position preview and optional transaction
Reverse position preview and combined transaction
MagicBlock ER health and account counts
Basket snapshot — raw basket bytes plus per-position metrics

get.summary: WebSocket stream for a MagicBlock owner's basket state.
get.description:
Two JSON message types:
- `{ "type": "basket",  "data": MbBasketSnapshotDto }` — full payload.
  Sent once on connect, then on every basket account update (gRPC).
  Contains raw basket bytes (base64), per-market `orderMetrics`, and the
  latest `positionMetrics`. The UI decodes the basket via the
  `magic-trade-client` SDK to get native `PositionMeta[]`/`OrderMeta[]`.
- `{ "type": "metrics", "data": HashMap<marketPk, MbPositionMetricsDto> }`
  — position metrics only. Sent on every oracle tick so PnL/leverage/liq
  keep refreshing without re-shipping the basket bytes or order metrics.

Server sends Ping frames every 30s; closes if Pong not received within 10s.

parameters.name: updateIntervalMs
parameters.description: Metrics refresh interval in ms (default 1000, min 100, max 10000)

101.description: WebSocket upgrade — streams positions and orders as JSON messages

503.description: Service unavailable — global connection limit reached

200.description: Exit fee and exit price for a position close
Entry price, fee, liquidation price, borrow rate

post.summary:
Cancel an existing limit order. Place is exposed via `/transaction-builder/
open-position` with `orderType: "LIMIT"` (place_limit_order is built there
alongside the position open path).

Edit an existing limit order — change limit price, size, TP, or SL.
`0` for any field means "keep existing"; both limit_price+size_amount=0
would cancel, but use `cancel-limit-order` for that intent for clarity.

depositAmountUi.description: Amount to deposit in UI format (denominated in deposit token)

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (always required — operates on existing position)

depositUsdValue.description: USD value of the deposit (UI format)

maxAddableUsd.description: Max addable amount in USD (UI format)

newLiquidationPrice.description: New liquidation price after adding collateral (UI format)

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (must own the orders)

orderId.description: Index of the limit order to cancel (0-4)

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (must own the order)

isStopLoss.description: True for stop-loss, false for take-profit

orderId.description: Index of the trigger order to cancel (0-4)

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (must own the order)

inputUsdUi.description: USD amount to close in UI format. Use full size to close entirely, or partial amount for partial close.

privilege.description: Explicit privilege level (see OpenPositionDto for details)

tokenStakeFafAccount.description: Token stake FAF account pubkey (for fee discounts)

userReferralAccount.description: User referral account pubkey (for referral privilege)

existingLiquidationPrice.description: Current liquidation price before close (UI format)

existingSize.description: Current position size in USD (UI format)

fees.description: Total fees (exit + borrow) in USD after discount (UI format)

feesBeforeDiscount.description: Total fees (exit + borrow) in USD before discount (UI format). Same as fees when no discount.

lockAndUnsettledFeeUsd.description: Lock and unsettled fee in USD (UI format), present for partial closes

newCollateral.description: Remaining collateral after close in USD (UI format)

newLiquidationPrice.description: New liquidation price after partial close, "0" for full close (UI format)

newSize.description: Remaining position size after close in USD (UI format)

receiveTokenAmountUi.description: Amount of receive token in UI format

receiveTokenAmountUsdUi.description: USD value of receive amount in UI format

settledPnl.description: Settled PnL in USD (negative prefixed with "-")

owner.description: Wallet pubkey of the user creating the referral account

referrer.description: The referrer's wallet pubkey (their token stake PDA is derived automatically)

isStopLoss.description: True for stop-loss, false for take-profit

orderId.description: Index of the trigger order to edit (0-4)

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (must be original order owner)

sizeAmountUi.description: New size amount in target token (UI format)

triggerPriceUi.description: New trigger price in UI format

owner.description: Wallet pubkey of the user

tokenStakeAccount.description: The derived token stake account PDA

depositAmountUi.description: Amount to deposit in UI format (denominated in deposit token)

marketSymbol.description:
Target market token symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC"). Together with `side`
and `owner` this identifies the position in the basket.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — required for basket lookup

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

MbBasketSnapshotDto.description:
Single payload streamed to the UI on every basket update or oracle tick.
The UI decodes `basket_data` via the `magic-trade-client` SDK to get native
PositionMeta / OrderMeta arrays, and looks up per-market metrics for
UI-ready strings (PnL, leverage, formatted prices, etc.).

basketData.description:
Base64-encoded raw basket account bytes. UI decodes via SDK Borsh layout.
`None` when the basket account hasn't been ingested yet.

basketPubkey.description: Basket account pubkey (PDA derived from owner)

orderMetrics.description:
Per-market order metrics, keyed by market pubkey (base58).
Only includes markets in active pools that have at least one non-empty
limit/TP/SL slot.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

positionMetrics.description:
Per-position derived metrics, keyed by market pubkey (base58).
Only includes positions in active pools with non-zero size.

MbCancelLimitOrderDto.description:
Cancel an existing limit order. Maps to the on-chain `edit_limit_order`
instruction with all-zero params, which the program treats as cancel
(returns reserved collateral, frees the slot).

orderId.description: Slot index of the limit order (0-4)

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

isStopLoss.description: True for stop-loss, false for take-profit

orderId.description:
Index of the trigger order to cancel (0-4). Pass 255 to cancel all
trigger orders for this market.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey (must own the order)

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

inputUsdUi.description:
USD amount to close in UI format. Use full size to close entirely,
or a partial amount for partial close.

marketSymbol.description:
Target market token symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC", "ETH"). Together with
`side` and `owner` this uniquely identifies the position in the basket.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — required for basket lookup

side.description:
Position side — LONG or SHORT. MagicBlock baskets can hold at most one
long and one short per market, so (marketSymbol, side) disambiguates.

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

withdrawTokenSymbol.description:
Token symbol to withdraw into (display hint; actual settlement token
is determined by the position's collateral custody).

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey (owner of the basket being delegated)

payer.description: Payer wallet pubkey (pays for the delegation transaction)

amount.description: Amount in human-readable UI units (decimal string, e.g. "1.5").

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

tokenMint.description:
SPL token mint pubkey. The source ATA and token program (Token-2022 vs
legacy SPL Token) are derived automatically from this + the owner.

MbEditLimitOrderDto.description:
Edit an existing limit order. Per the on-chain semantics:
  * `limit_price = 0` → keep existing limit price
  * `size_amount = 0` → keep existing size
  * `limit_price = 0 AND size_amount = 0` → cancel the order entirely
    (use `MbCancelLimitOrderDto` for that — clearer intent)
  * `take_profit_price = 0` → clear TP (or keep existing — depends on the
    program's per-field interpretation; supply explicitly to be safe)
  * `stop_loss_price = 0` → same as TP

limitPriceUi.description: New limit price in UI format. Omit to keep existing.

orderId.description: Slot index of the limit order (0-4)

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

sizeAmountUi.description: New size in target token UI format (e.g. "0.5"). Omit to keep existing.

stopLossUi.description: New stop-loss price in UI format. Omit to keep, "0" to clear.

takeProfitUi.description: New take-profit price in UI format. Omit to keep, "0" to clear.

MbEditTriggerOrderDto.description:
Edit an existing TP/SL trigger order — change trigger price and/or
the size that closes when it fires. The on-chain `edit_trigger_order`
replaces both fields atomically (no "keep existing" semantics, unlike
limit-order edit), so callers should provide both.

isStopLoss.description: True if this is a stop-loss slot, false for take-profit

orderId.description: Slot index of the trigger order (0-4)

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

sizeAmountUi.description: New size to close when the trigger fires, in target token UI format

triggerPriceUi.description: New trigger price in UI format

MbExecuteWithdrawalDto.description:
Execute / resume a withdrawal on the base chain — re-runs the ER callback in a
single base-chain transaction (transfers escrowed funds to the owner and
closes the escrow). Used to recover a withdrawal whose ER callback did not
settle automatically.

includeCustodySettlement.description:
Prepend a custody-settlement execution (set when the settlement receipt is
still on-chain and owned by the program). Defaults to true.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey (signer / fee payer)

tokenMint.description: Mint of the token to withdraw

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — the basket will be created as the owner's PDA
Owner wallet pubkey — the deposit ledger will be created as the owner's PDA

inputAmountUi.description: Input amount in human-readable UI format

owner.description: Wallet pubkey — required to build the transaction. Omit for preview only.

sessionToken.description: Ephemeral Rollup session token account (session-scoped authority)

signer.description:
Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey (for session-based signing).
When omitted, the owner signs directly.

stopLoss.description: Stop loss trigger price (UI format). Appends a trigger order instruction.

takeProfit.description: Take profit trigger price (UI format). Appends a trigger order instruction.

MbOrderMetricsDto.description:
Per-market order bundle. Keyed by market pubkey in the snapshot's
`order_metrics` map.

MbPlaceTpSlDto.description:
Place TP and/or SL on an existing position in a single atomic tx.
Either field can be omitted/empty; if both are set, both instructions are
included in one tx. Mirrors what the SDK's `triggerTpAndSl` builds.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

sizeAmountUi.description: Size to close when the trigger fires, in target token UI format

stopLossUi.description: Stop-loss trigger price (UI). Omit/empty to skip SL.

takeProfitUi.description: Take-profit trigger price (UI). Omit/empty to skip TP.

isStopLoss.description: True for stop-loss, false for take-profit

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey (owner of the position)

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

sizeAmountUi.description:
Size amount in target token (UI format, e.g. "0.5" SOL). Delta size
to close when the trigger fires.

triggerPriceUi.description: Trigger price in UI format (e.g. "160.00" for TP, "120.00" for SL)

MbPositionMetricsDto.description:
Per-position derived metrics. Keyed by market pubkey in the snapshot's
`position_metrics` map.

Includes UI-ready display strings (`*_ui`) so callers don't redo the
formatting, plus raw native-unit fields for any logic that needs full
precision (close sizing, custom rendering, etc.).

exitPrice.description: Current oracle price used for PnL calc

leverage.description: Leverage as raw u128 BPS (divide by BPS_POWER for ratio)

liquidationPrice.description: Computed liquidation price as oracle (price + exponent)

liquidationPriceUi.description: Liquidation price formatted in market's UI precision

pnlPercentageWithFee.description: Signed PnL percentage of collateral, e.g. "-2.05"

pnlWithFeeUsdUi.description: Signed PnL net of all fees, e.g. "-0.02" or "12.50"

closeAmountUsdUi.description: USD amount to close in UI format

marketSymbol.description:
Target market token symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC"). Together with `side`
and `owner` this identifies the position in the basket.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — required for basket lookup

limitPrice.description: Limit price in UI format (optional; uses live price if omitted)

marketSymbol.description:
Target market token symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC"). Together with `side`
and `owner` this identifies the position in the basket.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — required for basket lookup

entryPriceUi.description: Entry price in UI format (inline mode only)

mode.description:
Mode: "forward" (trigger price -> PnL), "reverse_pnl" (target PnL -> trigger price),
"reverse_roi" (target ROI -> trigger price)

owner.description:
Owner wallet pubkey. When provided, the backend uses the caller's
existing position for (marketSymbol, side). When omitted, the preview
uses the inline fields (entry price, size, collateral) — useful for
previewing TP/SL on a limit order that hasn't been placed yet.

sizeUsdUi.description: Position size in USD (inline mode only)

targetPnlUsdUi.description: Reverse PnL mode: target PnL in USD

targetRoiPercent.description: Reverse ROI mode: target ROI percentage

triggerPriceUi.description: Forward mode: trigger price to calculate PnL for

marketSymbol.description:
Target market token symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC"). Together with `side`
and `owner` this identifies the position in the basket.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey — required for basket lookup

signer.description: Ephemeral Rollup session signer pubkey. When omitted, the owner signs directly.

withdrawAmountUsdUi.description: USD amount to remove in UI format

withdrawTokenSymbol.description:
Token symbol to receive (display hint; actual settlement token is
determined by the position's collateral custody).

MbRequestWithdrawalDto.description:
Request a withdrawal — creates + delegates the withdrawal escrow on the base
chain and schedules the ER callback that releases funds. Built as a single
base-chain transaction (the first instruction idempotently creates the owner's
receiving ATA).

amount.description: Amount to withdraw, in UI units (decimal string, e.g. "12.5")

includeCustodySettlement.description:
Prepend a custody-settlement request (set when the custody settlement
receipt does not yet exist on-chain). Defaults to true.

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey (signer / fee payer)

tokenMint.description: Mint of the token to withdraw

MbReversePositionDto.description:
Reverse a position: close the current position fully and immediately open
an equal-leverage position on the opposite side, in a single atomic tx.

Proceeds from the close settle into the opposite-side's collateral custody
so the open instruction can pull them directly from the deposit ledger.
A 2% haircut is applied to the close proceeds to absorb price drift
between quote and on-chain execution.

leverage.description: Leverage to use for the new (opposite-side) position

owner.description: Owner wallet pubkey

side.description: Current position side — LONG or SHORT. The new position will be the opposite.

inputAmountUi.description: Input amount in human-readable UI format

owner.description: Wallet pubkey — required to build the transaction, omit for preview only

privilege.description:
Explicit privilege level. When provided, overrides automatic inference.
NONE = no privilege, STAKE = user's own FAF stake, REFERRAL = referred user.
Both `token_stake_faf_account` and `user_referral_account` must be provided
for STAKE or REFERRAL — otherwise falls back to NONE.

stopLoss.description: Stop loss trigger price (UI format). Appends a trigger order instruction.

takeProfit.description: Take profit trigger price (UI format). Appends a trigger order instruction.

tokenStakeFafAccount.description: Token stake FAF account pubkey (for fee discounts)

userReferralAccount.description: User referral account pubkey (for referral privilege)

availableLiquidity.description: Available liquidity for this market in USD (UI format)

entryFee.description: Entry fee in USD after discount (UI format)

entryFeeBeforeDiscount.description: Entry fee in USD before discount (UI format). Same as entry_fee when no discount.

marginFeePercentage.description: Hourly borrow rate percentage for the collateral custody (e.g. "0.00800" = 0.008%/hr)

newEntryPrice.description: New weighted-average entry price after this trade (UI format)

newLeverage.description: New position leverage after this trade

newLiquidationPrice.description: New liquidation price after this trade (UI format)

oldEntryPrice.description: Existing position entry price (present when increasing an existing position)

oldLeverage.description: Existing position leverage (present when increasing an existing position)

oldLiquidationPrice.description: Existing liquidation price (present when increasing an existing position)

openPositionFeePercent.description: Open position fee rate as percentage after discount (e.g. "0.03600" = 0.036%)

outputAmount.description: Output size amount in native units (raw u64)

outputAmountUi.description: Output size amount in human-readable UI format

oneOf.description: Stop-loss trigger quote (present when stop_loss is provided)

swapFeeUsdUi.description: Swap: total fee in USD (fee_in + fee_out converted to USD)

swapInPriceUi.description: Swap: min oracle price of input token (UI format)

swapOutPriceUi.description: Swap: max oracle price of output token (UI format)

oneOf.description: Take-profit trigger quote (present when take_profit is provided)

transactionBase64.description: Base64-encoded versioned transaction (present only when `owner` is provided)

youPayUsdUi.description: Total collateral you pay in USD (UI format)

youRecieveUsdUi.description: Position size you receive in USD (UI format)

isStopLoss.description: True for stop-loss, false for take-profit

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (required — owner of the position)

sizeAmountUi.description:
Size amount in target token (UI format, e.g. "0.5" SOL). This is the delta
size to close when the trigger fires.

triggerPriceUi.description: Trigger price in UI format (e.g. "160.00" for TP, "120.00" for SL)

priceImpactSet.description: Whether price impact has been set on this position

priceImpactUsd.description: Price impact fee in USD (raw u64 as string, USD_DECIMALS precision)

positionAccountData.description:
Raw position account data as base64 (client decodes via Anchor coder).
Omitted for MagicBlock positions — they live inside the basket account,
not as standalone position accounts.

closeAmountUsdUi.description: USD amount to close in UI format

limitPrice.description: Limit price in UI format (optional; uses live price if omitted)

deltaUsdUi.description: The USD delta for this action (deposit or withdraw), UI format.

newCollateralUsdUi.description: New collateral in USD after the action (UI format).

marketSymbol.description: For limit orders without an existing position -- inline fields

mode.description:
Mode: "forward" (trigger price -> PnL), "reverse_pnl" (target PnL -> trigger price),
"reverse_roi" (target ROI -> trigger price)

targetPnlUsdUi.description: Reverse PnL mode: target PnL in USD

targetRoiPercent.description: Reverse ROI mode: target ROI percentage

triggerPriceUi.description: Forward mode: trigger price to calculate PnL for

maxProfitPriceUi.description: Max profit price for LONG positions — TP input must stay below this value. Null for SHORT or correlated markets.

pnlUsdUi.description: Forward mode output: estimated PnL in USD

triggerPriceUi.description: Reverse mode output: computed trigger price

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (always required — operates on existing position)

withdrawAmountUsdUi.description: USD amount to remove in UI format

newLiquidationPrice.description: New liquidation price after removing collateral (UI format)

receiveAmountUi.description: Amount to receive in withdraw token (UI format)

receiveAmountUsdUi.description: USD value of receive amount (UI format)

degenMode.description: Enable degen mode for the new position

owner.description: Wallet pubkey (required — builds combined close+open transaction)

privilege.description: Explicit privilege level (see OpenPositionDto for details)

tokenStakeFafAccount.description: Token stake FAF account pubkey (for fee discounts)

userReferralAccount.description: User referral account pubkey (for referral privilege)

closeReceiveUsd.description: USD received from closing the existing position (after fees)

closeSettledPnl.description: Settled PnL from the close in USD (negative prefixed with "-")

newCollateralUsd.description: Collateral used for the new position in USD (UI format, after 2% haircut)

newSizeAmountUi.description: New position size in target token (UI format)

newSizeUsd.description: New position size in USD (UI format)

openEntryFee.description: Entry fee for the new position in USD

TriggerQuoteDto.description: Projected PnL and fee breakdown for a TP/SL trigger price

exitFeeUsdUi.description: Exit fee in USD after discount (UI format)

lossUsdUi.description: Projected loss in USD (UI format, "0" if profit)

maxProfitPriceUi.description: Max profit price for LONG TP — TP input must stay below this value. Null for SHORT or stop-loss.

profitUsdUi.description: Projected profit in USD (UI format, "0" if loss)

receiveUsdUi.description: Net receive amount in USD (UI format)
